summary: Project runtime source degradation semantics into the production match contract.
rationale: This slice makes the production contract expose safe, path-free source coverage, degraded completion, and required-source failure semantics from existing runtime coverage summaries without changing round dispatch behavior.
verification: uv run pytest tests/test_runtime_source_degradation.py tests/test_runtime_production_contract.py tests/test_api_production_contract.py tests/test_runtime_core_commit.py -q
uv run ruff check src/seektalent/api.py src/seektalent/runtime/production_contract.py tests/test_runtime_source_degradation.py
uv run ty check src tests tools
uv run pytest tests/test_liepin_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_cli.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py -q
deletion_targets: production contract source coverage that always reports empty succeeded coverage when runtime coverage is available
required source failures that are hidden behind a succeeded production completion status
source degradation diagnostics that expose local filesystem paths or debug artifact locations
risks: This slice only projects existing runtime coverage summaries; later runtime slices must preserve the same safe public contract if dispatch behavior changes.
Source status mappings are intentionally small and explicit; adding new runtime coverage categories should update this projection and its tests.
